locations.name: 哥伦比亚

relations.subject: Orinoco piculet
relations.object: The Clements Checklist of Birds of the World
relations.evidence: According to the Clements taxonomy the Orinoco piculet is found in eastern Colombia, northwestern Brazil, and adjacent southern Venezuela's Amazonas state. However, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has no records from Venezuela. The species inhabits the edges of humid mature forest, the edges of gallery forest, and dense thickets
